# AI Code Review

> An AI-powered code review tool that analyzes your code and gives feedback automatically to help developers improve code quality.

## Overview
AI Code Review is an intelligent code review platform that uses AI to automatically analyze codebases, identify issues, and provide actionable feedback. Available as both a web application and a terminal UI (TUI) for developers who prefer command-line workflows.

## Key Features
- **Automated Code Analysis** — AI-powered review of code quality, patterns, and best practices
- **Issue Tracking** — Detailed issue listing with severity levels
- **Review Dashboard** — Web-based dashboard for managing code reviews
- **Terminal UI (TUI)** — Command-line interface for developers
- **AST Analysis** — Abstract Syntax Tree-based code parsing
- **Static Analysis** — Built-in static analysis for common code issues
- **Multi-provider Support** — Works with multiple AI providers
- **Git Integration** — Direct integration with Git workflows
- **Onboarding Wizard** — Guided setup for new users

## Pages
- `/` — Web dashboard and review interface

## Tech Stack
- Next.js (App Router)
- TypeScript
- AI/LLM Integration
- Terminal UI (TUI)
- Git
